channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: No matter what happens at the Oscars, Delroy Lindo embraces 'the joy of this moment'
item.description: Lindo is nominated for best supporting actor for his role in Sinners. At the BAFTA awards on Sunday, Lindo was presenting when a man with Tourette syndrome in the audience yelled out a racial slur.
item.content:encoded:
Lindo is nominated for best supporting actor for his role in Sinners. At the BAFTA awards on Sunday, Lindo was presenting when a man with Tourette syndrome in the audience yelled out a racial slur.

(Image credit: Rebecca Cabage)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: If you loved 'Frankenstein,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved Frankenstein. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. You suggested other stories of men and monsters, plus your Guillermo del Toro favorites.
item.content:encoded:
So you loved Frankenstein. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. You suggested other stories of men and monsters, plus your Guillermo del Toro favorites.

(Image credit: Ken Woroner)
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Bugonia,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved Bugonia. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations and they wrote back with other Yorgos Lanthimos favorites and tales of abduction.
item.content:encoded:
Bugonia.'/>

So you loved Bugonia. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations and they wrote back with other Yorgos Lanthimos favorites and tales of abduction.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'F1,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved F1. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. Here are their suggestions for other fast-paced films, from 1971's Le Mans to Pixar's Cars.
item.content:encoded: So you loved F1. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. Here are their suggestions for other fast-paced films, from 1971's Le Mans to Pixar's Cars.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Hamnet,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved the best picture nominee Hamnet. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They came back with suggestions for Shakespeare, cottage-core and more.
item.content:encoded:
So you loved the best picture nominee Hamnet. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They came back with suggestions for Shakespeare, cottage-core and more.

(Image credit: Agata Grzybowska)
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Marty Supreme,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved the best picture nominee Marty Supreme. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They suggested high-energy films filled with chutzpah and hustle.
item.content:encoded: So you loved the best picture nominee Marty Supreme. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They suggested high-energy films filled with chutzpah and hustle.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'One Battle After Another,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved best picture nominee One Battle After Another. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share recommendations. They suggested The Battle of Algiers, V for Vendetta and more.
item.content:encoded: So you loved best picture nominee One Battle After Another. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share recommendations. They suggested The Battle of Algiers, V for Vendetta and more.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Train Dreams,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved best picture nominee Train Dreams. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share some recommendations. You wrote back suggesting more stories of love and landscape.
item.content:encoded:
So you loved best picture nominee Train Dreams. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share some recommendations. You wrote back suggesting more stories of love and landscape.

(Image credit: Netflix)
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Sentimental Value,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved best picture nominee Sentimental Value. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share recommendations. You suggested more films from Joachim Trier featuring Renate Reinsve.
item.content:encoded: So you loved best picture nominee Sentimental Value. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share recommendations. You suggested more films from Joachim Trier featuring Renate Reinsve.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey

item.title: If you loved 'Sinners,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved best picture nominee Sinners. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They suggested Near Dark, The Wailing and other vampire horror films.
item.content:encoded: So you loved best picture nominee Sinners. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. They suggested Near Dark, The Wailing and other vampire horror films.
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey
